claim_tested: The earlier local proof already met the narration-naturalness and caption-safe layout quality required for a delivery-grade code explainer.
limitations: The reviewed proof targets the earlier graph-video feasibility snapshot, not TEMPO commit 4afc6a3.
The observation comes from one repository owner rather than an independent target learner.
The feedback identifies visible delivery defects but does not isolate the speech engine, encoding, typography, or layout root cause.
This record contradicts delivery quality only; it does not negate that a playable technical proof existed.

provenance.collection_method: Repository-owner playback review of the hash-bound local proof followed by direct defect feedback in the active Codex conversation.

sample_context.description: One human quality review of the existing local graph-to-video proof.
sample_context.population: Repository owner/developer; not an independent target learner.
